title: $ALLOW_FOREIGN_THREADS
text: $ALLOW_FOREIGN_THREADS Enable Uniface to handle foreign threads. $ALLOW_FOREIGN_THREADS = 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description The assignment setting $ALLOW_FOREIGN_THREADS allows Uniface to handle multiple threads by serializing the invocation of COM objects. CAUTION: Do not use $ALLOW_FOREIGN_THREADS unless you have also set Thread Synchronization using Uniface COM Configuration utility. Related Links Configuring the COM Connector The COM connector provides full COM connectivity for Uniface applications. Global Uniface COM Settings Specify global options for the COM connector.
